name: chr1_1p36_microdeletion_breakpoints
description: Recurrent breakpoint cluster for the 1p36 microdeletion syndrome. Variable deletion sizes (1.5-10 Mb) are stabilised at several SD-mediated breakpoint hotspots within distal 1p36, the most common at ~2.0-2.5 Mb from the telomere.

architecture.internal_structure: Several SD pairs of 10-40 kb at >95% identity acting as NAHR substrates; non-recurrent breakpoints frequently at microhomology junctions.
